calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-04-2021 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-04-2021 Continued To Mar-24-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Application For Leave To Present Testimony At Default Hearing By Declaration [Ccp Sec. 585(D)]
Off Calendar Feb-11-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Garden Restaurant Inc. and Lai Ying Jin.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Lyssette Bareng. Reporter: Lisa Schafer, CSR #12723. Telephone: 530-867-4259. Email: lschafer@sftc.org.

Denis Klavdianos, Esq. of Glassberg Pollak & Associates appeared for plaintiff TBF Financial I, LLC.
Brett Boehm, Manager and Custodian Records for TBF Financial I LLC., was placed under oath but did not testify.
Both Messrs appeared via Zoom Video Conference for this morning's proceedings.
No appearance from defendants Garden Restaurant Inc. and Lai Ying Jin.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Future Receivables Sales Agreement and Guaranty was filed on June 15, 2020.
Default as to both defendants entered August 12, 2020.
DOE defendants were DISMISSED on October 22, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff TBF Financial I, LLC., and against defendants Garden Restaurant Inc. and Lai Ying Jin, as follows:

Principal/Damages - $77,461.28 (Amount pled in complaint).
Prejudgment Interest - $16,912.34.
Attorney Fees - $1,875.00.
Costs - $587.00.

Total - $96,836.12.

The Court accepts Second Amended Declaration in Lieu of Testimony for Default Judgment (TBF Financial I, LLC.) pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure section 585(d).

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Application For Leave To Present Testimony At Default Hearing By Declaration [Ccp Sec. 585(D)]
